title: Coordinate the development of regional plans
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate the development of regional plans demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Scope requirements

pcs.text: Determine reasons for development of a regional plan to identify broad goals and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine reasons for development of a regional plan to identify broad goals and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine reasons for development of a regional plan to identify broad goals and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Identify prior regional planning work as input to proposed regional planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify prior regional planning work as input to proposed regional planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify prior regional planning work as input to proposed regional planning process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Scope requirements

elements.title: Determine regional boundaries

pcs.text: Determine regional boundaries from economic, environmental and social factors that will produce a coherent plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine regional boundaries from economic, environmental and social factors that will produce a coherent plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine regional boundaries from economic, environmental and social factors that will produce a coherent plan.

pcs.text: Identify economic, environmental and social factors that overlap the proposed regional boundaries to develop a scope and weighting of the factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify economic, environmental and social factors that overlap the proposed regional boundaries to develop a scope and weighting of the factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify economic, environmental and social factors that overlap the proposed regional boundaries to develop a scope and weighting of the factors.

pcs.text: Review previous plans and reports to verify the suitability of the proposed regional boundaries
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review previous plans and reports to verify the suitability of the proposed regional boundaries?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review previous plans and reports to verify the suitability of the proposed regional boundaries.

pcs.text: Meet program requirements for the development of regional plans in the identification of regional boundaries
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Meet program requirements for the development of regional plans in the identification of regional boundaries?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Meet program requirements for the development of regional plans in the identification of regional boundaries.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine regional boundaries

elements.title: Identify regional resource management issues

pcs.text: Research regional natural resource issues from past documentation and stakeholder views
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research regional natural resource issues from past documentation and stakeholder views?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research regional natural resource issues from past documentation and stakeholder views.

pcs.text: Research and assess current and potential impacts of government, economic, industry, environmental and social factors on natural resource management issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and assess current and potential impacts of government, economic, industry, environmental and social factors on natural resource management issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and assess current and potential impacts of government, economic, industry, environmental and social factors on natural resource management issues.

pcs.text: Estimate the likely depth of research required to obtain sufficient information on issues for planning purposes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate the likely depth of research required to obtain sufficient information on issues for planning purposes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate the likely depth of research required to obtain sufficient information on issues for planning purposes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify regional resource management issues

elements.title: Scope stakeholders in regional resource management planning process

pcs.text: Scope economic, industry, social and government activities to identify influential organisations, groups and people and their particular interests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Scope economic, industry, social and government activities to identify influential organisations, groups and people and their particular interests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Scope economic, industry, social and government activities to identify influential organisations, groups and people and their particular interests.

pcs.text: Approach organisations and groups to determine their interests, viewpoints on natural resource management issues, and willingness to participate in regional planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Approach organisations and groups to determine their interests, viewpoints on natural resource management issues, and willingness to participate in regional planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Approach organisations and groups to determine their interests, viewpoints on natural resource management issues, and willingness to participate in regional planning process.

pcs.text: Identify nature of community involvement in planning process from understanding of issues and community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify nature of community involvement in planning process from understanding of issues and community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify nature of community involvement in planning process from understanding of issues and community.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Scope stakeholders in regional resource management planning process

elements.title: Develop proposal for regional plan

pcs.text: Review the objectives of the plan after scoping to determine feasibility of proposed processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the objectives of the plan after scoping to determine feasibility of proposed processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the objectives of the plan after scoping to determine feasibility of proposed processes.

pcs.text: Develop proposal for a new or revised plan to obtain funding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop proposal for a new or revised plan to obtain funding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop proposal for a new or revised plan to obtain funding.

pcs.text: Make estimates of time to complete tasks, including time for consultations and approvals and any discussion with Indigenous communities and groups
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make estimates of time to complete tasks, including time for consultations and approvals and any discussion with Indigenous communities and groups?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make estimates of time to complete tasks, including time for consultations and approvals and any discussion with Indigenous communities and groups.

pcs.text: Identify costs associated with development of regional plan from preliminary research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify costs associated with development of regional plan from preliminary research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify costs associated with development of regional plan from preliminary research.

pcs.text: Prepare proposal to address the requirements of program and relevant legislation and agency policies and processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare proposal to address the requirements of program and relevant legislation and agency policies and processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare proposal to address the requirements of program and relevant legislation and agency policies and processes.

pcs.text: Submit proposal for regional plan for approval and funding according to agency and program procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit proposal for regional plan for approval and funding according to agency and program procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit proposal for regional plan for approval and funding according to agency and program procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Develop proposal for regional plan
